lines: Excuse me, only employees are allowed... oh.
Of course. The new hire. Dr. A. Cula, good morning! We've been expecting you.
Mr. Pig is at the case board. He'll want to say hello first.
Then, you'll want to pick up your blue folder. It's on the second pile from the left.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: The archive is through that door, and Mr. Murrow is in there with the case file whenever you're ready for him.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: [A young woman. Incredibly busy. Hopefully friendly.]

choices.text: Good morning. Dr. A. Cula, reporting for duty.
Good morning, you must be Asia? I saw you on the website. Cula, the new hire. Pleasure to meet you.
Dr. A Cula, here to see Mr. Pig.

lines: Oooh no, I told them not to upload that picture, I was hungover that day! I'm sorry, I meant to say...
Dr. A. Cula, good morning! We've been expecting you.
Mr. Pig is at the case board. He'll want to say hello first.
Then, you'll want to pick up your blue folder. It's on the second pile from the left.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: The archive is through that door, and Mr. Murrow is in there with the case file whenever you're ready for him.

lines: Mr. Murrow will know what the case is actually about. Mr. Pig knows what it feels like, which is different and louder.
You found it? Excellent. Please do not put it on my desk; the reception counter has not been load-tested.

idle_flavor: I have filed three motions, answered five calls, and labelled a sandwich urgent. We are having a very productive collapse.
Mr. Pig panics. Mr. Murrow thinks. Crab suspects. Whimsy performs. I schedule the apocalypse.
If anyone asks, the office is running smoothly. If no one asks, please bring me the blue folder.
